svg.text: Decision Layer: Leakage-safe Multimodal Regression Pipeline
Perception JSONL → Modality-aware SBERT Encoding → Datazone Aggregation → Spatial/SAR Features → RidgeCV × 7 SIMD Domains

g.text: sat / ntl / sv / poi_text are kept separated before encoding
4 × 384-dim embeddings are concatenated into a 1536-dim representation
Multiple image-level embeddings → one unique embedding per DZ
mean-pool fixes duplicated-DZ bug and aligns samples with zone-level SIMD labels
All transformations using labels or fitted statistics are fold-local to prevent validation leakage
PoiFitter fitted only on train fold
